question: Có bao nhiêu user mới tháng này?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS new_users FROM user_service."Users" u WHERE u."CreatedAt" >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND NOT u."IsDeleted";
predicted_sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS new_users 
FROM user_service."Users" u 
WHERE u."CreatedAt" >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) 
  AND NOT u."IsDeleted";

question: Doanh thu theo tháng năm nay
gold_sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', o.paid_at) AS month, SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue FROM payment_service.orders o WHERE o.status = 'Paid' AND o.paid_at >= DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;
predicted_sql:
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', o.paid_at) AS month, SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue 
FROM payment_service.orders o 
WHERE o.status = 'Paid' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.paid_at) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) 
GROUP BY 1 
ORDER BY 1;

question: Top 5 sự kiện bán nhiều vé nhất
gold_sql: SELECT e.name, COUNT(t.id) AS sold FROM event_service.events e JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.event_id = e.id JOIN event_service.tickets t ON t.session_id = s.id GROUP BY e.id, e.name ORDER BY sold DESC LIMIT 5;
predicted_sql:
SELECT e.name, COUNT(t.id) AS sold 
FROM event_service.events e 
JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.event_id = e.id 
JOIN event_service.tickets t ON t.session_id = s.id 
WHERE NOT e.is_deleted AND NOT t.is_deleted 
GROUP BY e.id, e.name 
ORDER BY sold DESC 
LIMIT 5;

question: Tỉ lệ vé đã check-in của các sự kiện
gold_sql: SELECT e.name, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE t.is_checked_in) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS checkin_ratio FROM event_service.events e JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.event_id = e.id JOIN event_service.tickets t ON t.session_id = s.id GROUP BY e.id, e.name ORDER BY checkin_ratio DESC;
predicted_sql:
SELECT e.name, 
       COUNT(t.id) FILTER (WHERE t.is_checked_in) :: numeric 
       / NULLIF(COUNT(t.id), 0) AS checked_in_ratio
FROM event_service.events e
JOIN event_service.sessions s ON e.id = s.event_id
JOIN event_service.tickets t ON s.id = t.session_id
WHERE NOT e.is_deleted AND NOT s.is_deleted AND NOT t.is_deleted
GROUP BY e.id, e.name
ORDER BY checked_in_ratio DESC;

question: Sự kiện nào có doanh thu cao nhất tuần qua
gold_sql: SELECT e.name, SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue FROM event_service.events e JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.event_id = e.id JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.session_id = s.id WHERE o.status = 'Paid' AND o.paid_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY e.id, e.name ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 1;
predicted_sql:
SELECT e.name, SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue
FROM event_service.events e
JOIN event_service.sessions s ON e.id = s.event_id
JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.session_id = s.id
WHERE o.status = 'Paid' AND o.paid_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days'
GROUP BY e.id, e.name
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 1;

question: Tổng ghế đã bán theo từng sự kiện
gold_sql: SELECT e.name, COUNT(*) AS sold_seats FROM event_service.events e JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.event_id = e.id JOIN seat_service.seat_maps sm ON sm.session_id = s.id JOIN seat_service.seats st ON st.seat_map_id = sm.id WHERE st.status = 'Sold' GROUP BY e.id, e.name ORDER BY sold_seats DESC;
predicted_sql:
SELECT e.id, e.name, COUNT(t.id) AS sold_seats
FROM event_service.events e
JOIN event_service.sessions s ON e.id = s.event_id
JOIN event_service.tickets t ON s.id = t.session_id
WHERE NOT t.is_deleted AND NOT e.is_deleted
GROUP BY e.id, e.name
ORDER BY sold_seats DESC;

question: Org nào doanh thu cao nhất quý này
gold_sql: SELECT org."Name", SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue FROM org_service."Organizations" org JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.org_id = org."Id" WHERE o.status = 'Paid' AND o.paid_at >= DATE_TRUNC('quarter', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY org."Id", org."Name" ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 1;
predicted_sql:
SELECT org."Name", SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue 
FROM payment_service.orders o 
JOIN org_service."Organizations" org ON org."Id" = o.org_id 
WHERE o.status = 'Paid' 
  AND o.paid_at >= DATE_TRUNC('quarter', CURRENT_DATE) 
  AND NOT org."IsDeleted" 
  AND NOT o.is_deleted 
GROUP BY org."Id", org."Name" 
ORDER BY revenue DESC 
LIMIT 1;

question: Số lượng lời mời tham gia mỗi org
gold_sql: SELECT org."Name", COUNT(i."Id") AS invitations FROM org_service."Organizations" org LEFT JOIN org_service."Invitations" i ON i."OrganizationId" = org."Id" GROUP BY org."Id", org."Name" ORDER BY invitations DESC;
predicted_sql:
SELECT org."Id", org."Name", COUNT(i."Id") AS invitation_count
FROM org_service."Organizations" org
LEFT JOIN org_service."Invitations" i ON org."Id" = i."OrganizationId" AND NOT i."IsDeleted"
WHERE NOT org."IsDeleted"
GROUP BY org."Id", org."Name"
ORDER BY invitation_count DESC;

question: Sự kiện đang chờ duyệt
gold_sql: SELECT e.id, e.name FROM event_service.events e WHERE e.status = 1 AND NOT e.is_deleted;

question: Khách hàng chi tiêu nhiều nhất top 10
gold_sql: SELECT u."Username", SUM(o.total_amount) AS spend FROM user_service."Users" u JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.user_id = u."Id" WHERE o.status = 'Paid' GROUP BY u."Id", u."Username" ORDER BY spend DESC LIMIT 10;
predicted_sql:
SELECT u."Id", u."Name", SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent
FROM payment_service.orders o
JOIN user_service."Users" u ON u."Id" = o.user_id
WHERE o.status = 'Paid'
GROUP BY u."Id", u."Name"
ORDER BY total_spent DESC

predicted_sql:

question: Tỉ lệ ghế VIP đã bán
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE st.status = 'Sold') * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS vip_sold_ratio FROM seat_service.seats st JOIN event_service.legends l ON l.id = st.legend_id WHERE l.name = 'VIP';

question: So sánh doanh thu Q1 vs Q2 năm nay
gold_sql: SELECT EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM o.paid_at) AS quarter, SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue FROM payment_service.orders o WHERE o.status = 'Paid' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.paid_at) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) AND EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM o.paid_at) IN (1, 2) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM o.paid_at) = 1 THEN o.total_amount ELSE 0 END) AS q1_revenue,
  SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM o.paid_at) = 2 THEN o.total_amount ELSE 0 END) AS q2_revenue
FROM 
  payment_service.orders o
WHERE 
  o.status = 'Paid' 
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.paid_at) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE);

question: Sự kiện có nhiều session nhất
gold_sql: SELECT e.name, COUNT(s.id) AS n_sessions FROM event_service.events e JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.event_id = e.id GROUP BY e.id, e.name ORDER BY n_sessions DESC LIMIT 1;
predicted_sql:
SELECT e.name, COUNT(s.id) AS session_count
FROM event_service.events e
JOIN event_service.sessions s ON e.id = s.event_id
WHERE NOT e.is_deleted AND NOT s.is_deleted
GROUP BY e.id, e.name
ORDER BY session_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

question: User bị ban gần đây
gold_sql: SELECT u."Username", b."Reason", b."CreatedAt" FROM user_service."Users" u JOIN user_service."BanHistories" b ON b."UserId" = u."Id" ORDER BY b."CreatedAt" DESC LIMIT 10;

JOIN user_service."Users" u ON bh."UserId" = u."Id"

ORDER BY bh."CreatedAt" DESC 
LIMIT 1;

question: Doanh thu trung bình mỗi vé
gold_sql: SELECT SUM(o.total_amount) / NULLIF(COUNT(t.id), 0) AS avg_per_ticket FROM payment_service.orders o JOIN event_service.tickets t ON t.order_id = o.id WHERE o.status = 'Paid';

FROM payment_service.orders o

question: Legend nào được dùng nhiều nhất trong các sơ đồ ghế

question: Top 10 khách hàng mua ghế VIP chi tiêu cao nhất
gold_sql: SELECT u."Username", SUM(oi.price) AS vip_spend FROM user_service."Users" u JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.user_id = u."Id" JOIN payment_service.order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id JOIN seat_service.seats st ON st.id = oi.seat_id JOIN event_service.legends l ON l.id = st.legend_id WHERE o.status = 'Paid' AND l.name = 'VIP' GROUP BY u."Id", u."Username" ORDER BY vip_spend DESC LIMIT 10;
predicted_sql:
SELECT u."Id", u."Name", SUM(oi.price) AS total_spent
FROM user_service."Users" u
JOIN payment_service.orders o ON u."Id" = o.user_id
JOIN payment_service.order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id
WHERE oi.legend_name = 'VIP'
  AND o.status = 'Paid'
  AND NOT u."IsDeleted"
  AND NOT o.is_deleted
GROUP BY u."Id", u."Name"
ORDER BY total_spent DESC
LIMIT 10;

question: Doanh thu và phí platform theo từng sự kiện của mỗi tổ chức
gold_sql: SELECT org."Name" AS org_name, e.name AS event_name, SUM(o.total_amount) AS gross, SUM(o.platform_fee) AS fees FROM org_service."Organizations" org JOIN event_service.events e ON e.organization_id = org."Id" JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.event_id = e.id JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.session_id = s.id WHERE o.status = 'Paid' GROUP BY org."Id", org."Name", e.id, e.name ORDER BY gross DESC;
predicted_sql:
SELECT org."Name" AS organization_name, e.name AS event_name, 
       SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue, 
       SUM(o.platform_fee) AS platform_fee
FROM payment_service.orders o
JOIN org_service."Organizations" org ON org."Id" = o.org_id
JOIN event_service.events e ON e.id = o.session_id
WHERE o.status = 'Paid'
GROUP BY org."Id", org."Name", e.id, e.name
ORDER BY org."Name", e.name;

question: Số ghế đã bán theo từng tổ chức
gold_sql: SELECT sm.organization_id, COUNT(*) AS sold FROM seat_service.seat_maps sm JOIN seat_service.seats st ON st.seat_map_id = sm.id WHERE st.status = 'Sold' GROUP BY sm.organization_id ORDER BY sold DESC;

question: Tỉ lệ ghế đã bán của mỗi sơ đồ ghế
gold_sql: SELECT seat_map_id, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'Sold') * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS sold_ratio FROM seat_service.seats GROUP BY seat_map_id ORDER BY sold_ratio DESC;
predicted_sql:
SELECT sm.id, 
       COUNT(DISTINCT t.seat_id) FILTER (WHERE t.seat_id IS NOT NULL AND t.is_checked_in = FALSE) :: numeric 
       / NULLIF(sm.total_seats, 0) AS sold_ratio
FROM seat_service.seat_maps sm
LEFT JOIN seat_service.seats s ON sm.id = s.seat_map_id
LEFT JOIN event_service.tickets t ON s.id = t.seat_id
WHERE NOT sm.is_deleted AND NOT s.is_deleted AND NOT t.is_deleted
GROUP BY sm.id, sm.total_seats
ORDER BY sm.id;

question: Top 3 loại vé doanh thu cao nhất của mỗi sự kiện
gold_sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT e.name AS event_name, oi.legend_name, SUM(oi.price) AS revenue, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY e.id ORDER BY SUM(oi.price) DESC) AS rk FROM payment_service.order_items oi JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id AND o.status = 'Paid' JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.id = o.session_id JOIN event_service.events e ON e.id = s.event_id GROUP BY e.id, e.name, oi.legend_name) r WHERE rk <= 3 ORDER BY event_name, rk;

FROM event_service.events e
JOIN event_service.sessions s ON e.id = s.event_id
JOIN event_service.tickets t ON s.id = t.session_id
JOIN event_service.legends l ON t.legend_name = l.name AND l.event_id = e.id
WHERE NOT e.is_deleted AND NOT s.is_deleted AND NOT t.is_deleted AND NOT l.is_deleted
GROUP BY e.id, e.name, l.name
ORDER BY e.id, revenue DESC;

question: Sự kiện có doanh thu vượt mức trung bình
gold_sql: SELECT e.name, SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue FROM event_service.events e JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.event_id = e.id JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.session_id = s.id WHERE o.status = 'Paid' GROUP BY e.id, e.name HAVING SUM(o.total_amount) > (SELECT AVG(ev_rev) FROM (SELECT SUM(o2.total_amount) AS ev_rev FROM event_service.sessions s2 JOIN payment_service.orders o2 ON o2.session_id = s2.id WHERE o2.status = 'Paid' GROUP BY s2.event_id) x) ORDER BY revenue DESC;
predicted_sql:
SELECT e.name, SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue
FROM event_service.events e
JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.session_id = e.id
WHERE o.status = 'Paid' AND NOT o.is_deleted
GROUP BY e.id, e.name
HAVING SUM(o.total_amount) > (SELECT AVG(revenue) FROM (SELECT SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue FROM event_service.events e JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.session_id = e.id WHERE o.status = 'Paid' AND NOT o.is_deleted GROUP BY e.id) AS subquery);

question: So sánh doanh thu tháng này với tháng trước theo tổ chức
gold_sql: SELECT o.org_id, SUM(o.total_amount) FILTER (WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', o.paid_at) = DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)) AS this_month, SUM(o.total_amount) FILTER (WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', o.paid_at) = DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month')) AS last_month FROM payment_service.orders o WHERE o.status = 'Paid' GROUP BY o.org_id ORDER BY this_month DESC NULLS LAST;
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
  org."Name", 
  SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM o.paid_at) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE) THEN o.total_amount ELSE 0 END) AS this_month_revenue,
  SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM o.paid_at) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE) - 1 THEN o.total_amount ELSE 0 END) AS last_month_revenue
FROM 
  payment_service.orders o
JOIN 
  org_service."Organizations" org ON org."Id" = o.org_id
WHERE 
  o.status = 'Paid' 
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.paid_at) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
GROUP BY 
  org."Id", org."Name"
ORDER BY 
  this_month_revenue DESC;

question: Xếp hạng sự kiện theo vé bán trong từng tổ chức

ORDER BY org."Id", sold DESC;

question: Sự kiện có tỉ lệ lấp đầy ghế trên 20%
gold_sql: SELECT e.name, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE st.status = 'Sold') * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS fill_rate FROM event_service.events e JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.event_id = e.id JOIN seat_service.seat_maps sm ON sm.session_id = s.id JOIN seat_service.seats st ON st.seat_map_id = sm.id GROUP BY e.id, e.name HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE st.status = 'Sold') * 1.0 / COUNT(*) > 0.2 ORDER BY fill_rate DESC;

SELECT e.id, e.name, 
       COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) FILTER (WHERE s.status = 'Sold')::numeric 
       / NULLIF(sm.total_seats, 0) AS fill_ratio
FROM event_service.events e
JOIN seat_service.seat_maps sm ON e.id = sm.event_id
JOIN seat_service.seats s ON sm.id = s.seat_map_id
WHERE NOT e.is_deleted AND NOT sm.is_deleted AND NOT s.is_deleted
GROUP BY e.id, e.name, sm.total_seats
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) FILTER (WHERE s.status = 'Sold')::numeric 
       / NULLIF(sm.total_seats, 0) > 0.2;

question: Doanh thu mỗi tổ chức kèm số sự kiện và số vé bán
gold_sql: SELECT org."Name", COUNT(DISTINCT e.id) AS events, COUNT(t.id) AS tickets, COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) AS revenue FROM org_service."Organizations" org JOIN event_service.events e ON e.organization_id = org."Id" JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.event_id = e.id LEFT JOIN event_service.tickets t ON t.session_id = s.id LEFT JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.id = t.order_id AND o.status = 'Paid' GROUP BY org."Id", org."Name" ORDER BY revenue DESC;

  LEFT JOIN event_service.events e ON org."Id" = e.organization_id AND NOT e.is_deleted
  LEFT JOIN event_service.sessions s ON e.id = s.event_id AND NOT s.is_deleted

question: Tổ chức mà mỗi khách hàng chi tiêu nhiều nhất
gold_sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT u."Username", org."Name" AS org_name, SUM(o.total_amount) AS spend, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY u."Id" ORDER BY SUM(o.total_amount) DESC) AS rk FROM user_service."Users" u JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.user_id = u."Id" JOIN org_service."Organizations" org ON org."Id" = o.org_id WHERE o.status = 'Paid' GROUP BY u."Id", u."Username", org."Id", org."Name") r WHERE rk = 1 ORDER BY spend DESC LIMIT 20;

LIMIT 1;

question: Top 10 sự kiện theo doanh thu kèm tên tổ chức và số ghế đã bán
gold_sql: SELECT e.name AS event_name, org."Name" AS org_name, SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seat_service.seat_maps sm JOIN seat_service.seats st ON st.seat_map_id = sm.id WHERE sm.event_id = e.id AND st.status = 'Sold') AS sold_seats FROM event_service.events e JOIN org_service."Organizations" org ON org."Id" = e.organization_id JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.event_id = e.id JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.session_id = s.id AND o.status = 'Paid' GROUP BY e.id, e.name, org."Name" ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 10;
predicted_sql:
SELECT e.name, org."Name", SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue, COUNT(t.id) AS sold_seats
FROM event_service.events e
JOIN org_service."Organizations" org ON org."Id" = e.organization_id
JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.event_id = e.id
JOIN event_service.tickets t ON t.session_id = s.id
JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.session_id = s.id
WHERE o.status = 'Paid' AND NOT e.is_deleted AND NOT t.is_deleted
GROUP BY e.id, e.name, org."Id", org."Name"
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

question: Toàn cảnh mỗi tổ chức: số sự kiện, số vé bán, doanh thu
gold_sql: SELECT org."Name", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event_service.events e WHERE e.organization_id = org."Id") AS events, (SELECT COUNT(t.id) FROM event_service.events e JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.event_id = e.id JOIN event_service.tickets t ON t.session_id = s.id WHERE e.organization_id = org."Id") AS tickets, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(o.total_amount) FROM payment_service.orders o WHERE o.org_id = org."Id" AND o.status = 'Paid'), 0) AS revenue FROM org_service."Organizations" org ORDER BY revenue DESC;
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
  org."Id", 
  org."Name", 
  COUNT(DISTINCT e.id) AS event_count, 
  COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS ticket_count, 
  SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue
FROM 
  org_service."Organizations" org
  LEFT JOIN event_service.events e ON org."Id" = e.organization_id AND NOT e.is_deleted
  LEFT JOIN event_service.sessions s ON e.id = s.event_id AND NOT s.is_deleted
  LEFT JOIN event_service.tickets t ON s.id = t.session_id AND NOT t.is_deleted
  LEFT JOIN payment_service.orders o ON t.order_id = o.id AND o.status = 'Paid'
WHERE 
  NOT org."IsDeleted"
GROUP BY 
  org."Id", 
  org."Name"
ORDER BY 
  org."Id";
